title: LANTERN - 211info
text: MARION AND POLK EARLY LEARNING HUB LANTERN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers parenting tips on topics such as sleep, eating, potty training, tantrums, and text information on local resources and events. 2995 Ryan Drive SE Suite 100 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Ages 0-11 and their caregivers. Child's age and zipcode are required. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 485-3219 .
